balance_date.text: ข้อมูล ณ วันที่

root.sql:
SELECT --sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.seq_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.norm_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.norm_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.norm_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.norm_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.norm_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.spec_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.spec_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.spec_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.spec_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.spec_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as grp_con_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.norm_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.spec_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.intarr_date, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_status_code, nvl( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.fund_amount , 0 ) as fund_amount, ( select count( distinct count_rep.membership_no ) from sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal count_rep where count_rep.member_group_no = sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no ) as c_count_mem FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( trim( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no ) = trim( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) ) --and ( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id = '000' )) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no between '012001' and '01201' ) )
order by sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_status_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.seq_no
